name: Predictive Discovery Limited
analysis: PDI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.9700, stop A$0.6979, target A$1.7862 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
